{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Gesha's resonance cannon (The Last Horizon)
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator's energy readout decreased due to the cost of using a resonance cannon.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42">''The Knight'', chapter 42</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
